mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, process_instance_id, task_instance_id, supervisor_user_id, supervision_reason, supervision_type, status, close_time, tenant_id

where.if:
and task_instance_id in
CAST(#{item} AS BIGINT)

and process_instance_id in
CAST(#{item} AS BIGINT)

mapper.update: update se_supervision_instance set status = 'closed', close_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gmt_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where task_instance_id = #{taskInstanceId} and status = 'active' and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select:
select from se_supervision_instance
order by gmt_create desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{pageOffset}
